messages.message:
Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Math.random` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

  268 |
  269 |     const waveHeights = useMemo(() =>
> 270 |         [...Array(30)].map((_, i) => 20 + Math.sin(i * 0.5) * 15 + Math.random() * 10),
      |                                                                    ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  271 |         []);
  272 |
  273 |     return (

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'fetchAuditLogs' and 'fetchUsers'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [activeTab, fetchAuditLogs, fetchUsers]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'display' and 'duration'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [display, duration, value]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchStats'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.
